name: Hedda's Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add the egg and almond extract, mixing well.
3. Gradually add the flour and salt, stirring until combined.
4. Stir in the coconut until evenly distributed.
5. Form the dough into one-inch balls.
6. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Flatten each ball with a fork.
8. Bake at 325°F (163°C) for 15 to 18 minutes, or until lightly golden around the edges.
9. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
